title: Xtra Crumbly Japanese Bryndza Cheese Miso Ramen
description: A sour and crumbly Japanese-inspired ramen dish featuring bryndza cheese, perfect for a flexitarian-friendly brunch
instructions: Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot
Add the ramen noodles and cook according to package instructions
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste, soy sauce, sake, and mirin
Add the miso mixture to the pot and stir to combine
In a small pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat
Add the crumbled bryndza cheese to the pan and cook until lightly browned
Deglaze the pan with a small amount of the hot broth
To assemble the dish, place some noodles in the bottom of individual mini cocottes
Add a spoonful of the miso broth, some crumbled bryndza cheese, and a sprinkle of green onions on top
